name: Lasagna with White Sauce
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 Ounce tomatoes with liquid, cut up
1/4 Teaspoon ground red or cayenne pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef and onion in a Dutch oven until the meat is browned and the onions are tender. Drain.
2. Add tomatoes, tomato paste, bouillon cube, and seasonings to the pan. Cover and cook over medium-low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. In a medium saucepan, melt butter and stir in flour, salt, and pepper. Gradually add milk and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
4. Reduce heat and cook for an additional minute. Remove from heat and stir in half of the cheese.
5. Pour half of the meat sauce into an ungreased 13x9x2-inch baking dish. Cover with half of the lasagna noodles.
6. Cover with remaining meat sauce, then top with remaining noodles.
7. Pour the white sauce over the noodles and sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
8. Cover and bake at 400 degrees for 40 minutes or until the noodles are cooked through.
